name: ATUNLO
description: ATUNLO is a leading European brand specializing in high-quality tuna sourced from the world's major oceans. The company is committed to sustainable and responsible fishing practices, ensuring the preservation of marine ecosystems for future generations.

name: Tri Marine Group
description: Tri Marine is a leading tuna supply company that emphasizes sustainability and responsible fishing practices, certified by the Marine Stewardship Council. With a global presence in major tuna-producing areas, they offer customized supply solutions while prioritizing ethical business practices and minimizing environmental impacts.

name: EUROFISH S.A.
description: Eurofish is a prominent Ecuadorian manufacturer and exporter of tuna products, processing 45,000 MT of whole round tuna annually and supplying global markets. With a strong focus on quality and sustainability, the company has expanded its operations to include canning tuna under its Manabí brand.

name: Baja Aqua-Farms SA CV
description: The company specializes in producing fresh and frozen sashimi-grade tuna, exporting to high-end restaurants and supermarkets worldwide.

name: Ensis Fisheries Pvt Ltd
description: Ensis Fisheries is a leading exporter of fresh tuna and seafood from the Maldives, offering a diverse range of products including Grade-A Sashimi, frozen and canned MSC Skipjack Tuna, and fresh Yellowfin Tuna. Their commitment to sustainable fishing practices and high-quality products meets the growing demand for Maldives tuna, known for its sustainability and traceability.

name: CONSERVAS DEL NOROESTE S.A. (CONNORSA)
description: The company is a Galician firm that has been specializing in the production and marketing of canned fish and seafood since 1985, offering a wide and diverse range of high-quality tuna products.

name: ATUNSA
description: ATUNSA is a specialized manufacturer in the fishing of tropical tunas, operating modern vessels and a refrigeration plant that enhances their ability to deliver high-quality tuna products to global markets.

name: Gulf Food Products Company شركة الخليج للمواد الغذائية
description: The company offers a variety of tuna products, including Water Tuna, Oil Tuna, and Hot Tuna, highlighting their commitment to high product quality and transparency in their operations.

name: Tuna Traffic
description: Tuna Traffic is an agile and innovative company that emphasizes client-focused teamwork and effective communication. Since its inception in 2010, it has delivered impactful marketing and strategic results across various industries.

name: Phillips
description: Phillips Seafood offers Waterman's Reserve Yellowfin Tuna Saku Blocks, which are ideal for sashimi and seared ahi presentations. These products feature a moderate flavor and firm texture, making them suitable for various culinary applications.
